overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic sunlit urban plaza, ascending stairs to a covered parking area, entering a red sports car, and driving through the covered structure to park near a waterfront promenade. The clip transitions from bright outdoor lighting to darker artificial lighting and back to sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with commercial buildings and outdoor cafes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sunny plaza past palm trees and outdoor seating areas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking across the plaza

entered.detail: low-rise commercial structure with orange trim and glass storefronts
tall modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade
tall palm trees lining the edge of the plaza
white umbrellas shading outdoor dining tables
large vertical digital screen displaying palm tree imagery

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright, sunlit futuristic urban plaza with modern commercial buildings. The camera follows the character walking past outdoor cafes with white umbrellas and palm trees, approaching a staircase in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian staircase leading to elevated covered walkway

events.description: begins ascending the wide concrete staircase
reaches the top of stairs and enters the covered walkway area

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs toward the upper level while pedestrians descend

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward
small food cart with striped awning at the base of the stairs
dark entrance to the covered pedestrian walkway at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and climbs a wide concrete staircase, transitioning from the open plaza to an elevated area. A food vendor stall is visible to the left as pedestrians walk down the stairs, and the entrance to a covered walkway appears at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered vehicle drop-off area with neon signage and concrete pillars

events.description: enters the darker covered area with reduced natural light and neon illumination
approaches and enters the red sports car parked under the structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered concrete structure toward the parked red sports car

notable_agents.action: person in red outfit walking away from the camera toward the parked cars

entered.detail: red sports car with black stripes parked under the covered structure
large cylindrical concrete support pillars for the overhead structure
glowing cyan neon sign indicating 24/7 service
tall vertical digital advertisement showing a woman's face
large dark truck parked in the covered area

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the covered concrete structure, the scene becomes darker with neon lighting. The character approaches a red sports car parked between concrete pillars, passing under a 24/7 neon sign and large digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered parking garage with fluorescent and neon lighting

events.description: starts the engine and begins driving the vehicle through the covered structure
navigates past a parked NCPD police car and other stationary vehicles

agents.ego_description: driving the red sports car through the covered parking structure, maneuvering between parked vehicles

entered.detail: white and cyan police cruiser with NCPD markings parked along the right side
teal and red sports car parked on the left side of the structure
massive concrete ceiling with exposed beams and fluorescent lighting strips
assorted parked cars lining both sides of the covered driveway

segments.scene_description: Now driving the red sports car, the camera follows from behind as the vehicle navigates through the dimly lit covered parking structure. The car passes an NCPD police cruiser and a distinctive teal sports car, moving under the massive concrete overhead structure with cyan neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with palm trees and neon storefronts

events.description: exits the covered structure into bright sunlight, transitioning from artificial to natural lighting
slows the vehicle and parks near the waterfront promenade

agents.ego_description: driving along the waterfront and parking the car near the promenade with palm trees visible

entered.detail: open walkway along the water with distant city views
line of palm trees along the edge of the waterfront
bright purple neon signage for a waterfront shop
metal railings separating the vehicle area from the pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: The car emerges from the covered structure into bright sunlight along a waterfront promenade. Palm trees line the walkway as the vehicle slows and parks near a teal sports car. Neon shop signs and pedestrian railings are visible as the scene ends in the open waterfront area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sunlit urban plaza into a dim industrial parking structure before emerging back into the open air of a waterfront promenade. It begins by following a character past outdoor cafes and palm trees toward a wide concrete staircase, ascending from the open plaza to an elevated level. As the character enters a covered concrete structure, the lighting shifts from natural sunlight to a darker atmosphere dominated by neon signs and digital billboards, leading directly to a parked red sports car. The perspective then shifts to follow the vehicle from behind as it navigates the dimly lit garage past police cruisers and cyan neon accents. Finally, the car emerges from the shadows back into brilliant sunlight, slowing to a stop along a palm-lined waterfront walkway.
